description: Style NoteSober coloured base with shiny stones makes these sandals classy yet elegant. They can be worn with ethnic Indian wear. These pair of catwalk sandals can be worn to work with a pair of jeans and a kurta and some ethnic accessories.Heel: 1.5"Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with a thong style strap and a strap across the forefoot Beige footbed with a copper heel patch and a kitten heelTPR outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
